body: @sepo-agent /answer check what others similar fixes need for this?

comments.body:
I checked issue #28 and there is no parent/tracking issue linked. The closest related work is open PR #21, which already identifies the same install/update gap plus a few adjacent runner-stability fixes: https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/21

What I’d include for this issue:

1. Add/keep generated-output exclusions in both install/update skills:
   - [`install-agent`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.skills/install-agent/SKILL.md#L56) and [`update-agent`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.skills/update-agent/SKILL.md#L59) already say not to copy `node_modules/`, `dist/`, `.agent/node_modules/`, `.agent/dist/`, etc.
   - They should also explicitly say to **merge** `.agent/dist/` and `.agent/node_modules/` into the target repo’s `.gitignore`.

2. Update install docs:
   - [`install-existing-repository.md`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/docs/deployment/install-existing-repository.md#L11) currently says to copy `.agent/` and `.github/`, but does not mention `.gitignore`.
   - Add a short generated-output rule block there.

3. Update this repo’s own `.gitignore`:
   - Current file has `.agent/dist/` but not `.agent/node_modules/`: https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.gitignore#L1-L4
   - Add `.agent/node_modules/`.

4. Regression/test coverage:
   - Since this is docs/skill guidance, a lightweight envelope/fixture assertion is enough if we want to pin the contract.
   - Similar fixes in PR #21 used `.agent/src/__tests__/envelope.test.ts` to assert workflow/doc invariants.

Important caveat from PR #21: I would **not** bundle this with the `checkout-pr` cleanup change unless we also fix the runtime risk called out in review. Deleting `.agent/dist` before checkout can break later `node .agent/dist/...` steps if the PR branch does not track dist. For issue #28, the safer scope is just: skill guidance + install docs + `.gitignore` + focused assertion.
@sepo-agent /answer can you double check if this is fixed?

Double checked. The core install-side fix is on `main` via merged PR #36: https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/36

What is fixed:

- Root `.gitignore` now includes both generated agent paths:
  - `.agent/node_modules/`
  - `.agent/dist/`
  - https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.gitignore#L1-L4

- Install docs now tell users to merge those rules into the target repo’s existing `.gitignore`:
  - https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/docs/deployment/install-existing-repository.md#L20-L27

- `install-agent` skill now explicitly says:
  - do not copy generated/local-only dirs
  - merge `.agent/dist/` and `.agent/node_modules/` into target `.gitignore`
  - https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.skills/install-agent/SKILL.md#L56-L61
  - https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.skills/install-agent/SKILL.md#L90-L94

What is not fully fixed from my earlier checklist:

- `update-agent` still only says not to copy generated dirs; it does **not** explicitly instruct merging `.agent/dist/` / `.agent/node_modules/` into the target `.gitignore`.
  - https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.skills/update-agent/SKILL.md#L59-L61
  - https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.skills/update-agent/SKILL.md#L90-L99

So: **yes for install-agent / install docs / repo `.gitignore`; partial if we intended this to cover both install and update skills.** Issue #28 is still open, so I’d either close it as fixed if install-only was intended, or do one small follow-up to add the same `.gitignore` merge guidance to `update-agent`.

> update-agent still only says not to copy generated dirs; it does not explicitly instruct merging .agent/dist/ / .agent/node_modules/ into the target .gitignore.
https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.skills/update-agent/SKILL.md#L59-L61
https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.skills/update-agent/SKILL.md#L90-L99

@sepo-agent /orchestrate please fix this issue minimally

Sepo automation handoff dispatched: `orchestrate` -> `implement` (round 2/10).

manual orchestrate start on issue; dispatching implement

**Sepo implementation finished**

- Branch: `agent/implement-issue-28/codex-25147466126`
- Pull request: https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/55

Updated `.skills/update-agent/SKILL.md` to explicitly require merging `.agent/dist/` and `.agent/node_modules/` into the target repository's existing `.gitignore` during agent updates. Verified the focused doc diff with `git diff --check` and a targeted `rg` search.

title: Add including `dist (and node modules etc) ` for the installation skills
